languages.text: "Все эти люди — ржавчина на потрохах вашего корабля. Их надо соскрести, всех вместе — чтобы не распространили железные оковы дальше. Я помогу сделать это, Лорд-капитан".

traits.locale_text: "Все эти люди — ржавчина на потрохах вашего корабля. Их надо соскрести, всех вместе — чтобы не распространили железные оковы дальше. Я помогу сделать это, Лорд-капитан".

languages.text: "All these people are like rust eating away at the bowels of your ship. They must be scraped off, all of them, so they do not spread their iron shackles further. I will help you do this, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: "Все эти люди — ржавчина на потрохах вашего корабля. Их надо соскрести, всех вместе — чтобы не распространили железные оковы дальше. Я помогу сделать это, Лорд-капитан".

traits.locale_text: "All these people are like rust eating away at the bowels of your ship. They must be scraped off, all of them, so they do not spread their iron fetters. I will help you do this, Lord Captain."
"All these people are like rust eating away at the bowels of your ship. They must be scraped off, all of them, so they do not spread their iron fetters. I will help you do this, Lord Captain."

"All these people are like rust eating away at the bowels of your ship. They must be scraped off, all of them, so they do not spread their iron shackles further. I will help you do this, Lord Captain."

"All these people are like rust eating away at the bowels of your ship. They must be scraped off, all of them, so they do not spread their iron shackles further. I will help you do this, Lord Captain."

languages.text: "All diese Leute sind wie Rost, der an Eurem Schiff nagt. Sie müssen allesamt abgeschabt werden, um ihre eisernen Fesseln nicht noch weiter zu schwächen. Ich werde Euch dabei helfen, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: "All these people are like rust eating away at the bowels of your ship. They must be scraped off, all of them, so they do not spread their iron shackles further. I will help you do this, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: "All diese Leute sind wie Rost, der an Eurem Schiff nagt. Sie müssen allesamt abgeschabt werden, um ihre eisernen Fesseln nicht noch weiter zu schwächen. Ich werde Euch dabei helfen, Lord Captain."

languages.text: « Tous ces gens sont comme de la rouille qui ronge les entrailles de votre navire. Il faut tous les éliminer pour qu'ils ne propagent pas davantage leurs chaînes de fer. Et je vais vous y aider, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »
languages.original_text: "All these people are like rust eating away at the bowels of your ship. They must be scraped off, all of them, so they do not spread their iron shackles further. I will help you do this, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: « Tous ces gens sont comme de la rouille qui ronge les entrailles de votre navire. Il faut tous les éliminer pour qu'ils ne propagent pas davantage leurs chaînes de fer. Et je vais vous y aider, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »

languages.text: “这些家伙就像腐蚀您舰船内部的锈斑，必须把他们全部清除干净，免得他们把那铁镣铐扩散得更远。我会帮您办成这事，舰长大人。”
languages.original_text: "All these people are like rust eating away at the bowels of your ship. They must be scraped off, all of them, so they do not spread their iron shackles further. I will help you do this, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: “这些家伙就像腐蚀您舰船内部的锈斑，必须把他们全部清除干净，免得他们把那铁镣铐扩散得更远。我会帮您办成这事，舰长大人。”

languages.text: «Esta gente es como óxido que corroe las entrañas de su nave. Hay que eliminarlos a todos para que no propaguen estos grilletes de metal. Le ayudaré a hacerlo, Lord Capitán».
languages.original_text: "All these people are like rust eating away at the bowels of your ship. They must be scraped off, all of them, so they do not spread their iron shackles further. I will help you do this, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: «Esta gente es como óxido que corroe las entrañas de su nave. Hay que eliminarlos a todos para que no propaguen estos grilletes de metal. Le ayudaré a hacerlo, Lord Capitán».

languages.text: 「この人たちはみな、船の底を蝕む錆のようなものだ。鉄の枷を広げないためにも、全員、削ぎ落とさなければならない。ロード・キャプテン、私がそのお手伝いをいたします」
languages.original_text: "All these people are like rust eating away at the bowels of your ship. They must be scraped off, all of them, so they do not spread their iron shackles further. I will help you do this, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: 「この人たちはみな、船の底を蝕む錆のようなものだ。鉄の枷を広げないためにも、全員、削ぎ落とさなければならない。ロード・キャプテン、私がそのお手伝いをいたします」

languages.text: "Bütün bu insanlar, geminin organlarını içten mahveden pas gibi. Hepsi kazınmalı ki demir prangalarını daha fazla yayamasınlar. Bunu yapmanıza yardım edeceğim Lord Kaptan."
languages.original_text: "All these people are like rust eating away at the bowels of your ship. They must be scraped off, all of them, so they do not spread their iron shackles further. I will help you do this, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: "Bütün bu insanlar, geminin organlarını içten mahveden pas gibi. Hepsi kazınmalı ki demir prangalarını daha fazla yayamasınlar. Bunu yapmanıza yardım edeceğim Lord Kaptan."
